title: TCI Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TCI Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TCI Express family as a Warehouse Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!
